creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Like in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170614, sysutils/loganalyzer says:

DEFAULT_PHP_VER=5

in the Makefile

The documentation does state that it need PHP5 - but this probably refers to php5 vs. php4 as the software predates PHP54 considerably.

Fix: 

Remove line 36 from the makefile.

Also, there's a newer release upstream anyway...
How-To-Repeat: build the port - it draws in php5.4.
